# Generated by ip6tables-save — synthetic fixture for unit tests.
# Addresses use RFC 3849 documentation prefixes only.
*filter
:INPUT DROP [0:0]
:FORWARD DROP [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
:net2fw - [0:0]
:net2loc - [0:0]
:loc2fw - [0:0]
:loc2net - [0:0]
:fw2net - [0:0]
:fw2loc - [0:0]
:net_frwd - [0:0]
:loc_frwd - [0:0]
:net_input - [0:0]
:loc_input - [0:0]
:shorewall_Drop - [0:0]
:shorewall_Reject - [0:0]
# INPUT chain
-A INPUT -m conntrack --ctstate ESTABLISHED,RELATED -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i lo -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -i eth1 -j loc_input
-A INPUT -i eth0 -j net_input
-A INPUT -j shorewall_Drop
# FORWARD chain
-A FORWARD -m conntrack --ctstate ESTABLISHED,RELATED -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -i eth1 -j loc_frwd
-A FORWARD -i eth0 -j net_frwd
-A FORWARD -j shorewall_Drop
# OUTPUT chain
-A OUTPUT -m conntrack --ctstate ESTABLISHED,RELATED -j ACCEPT
-A OUTPUT -j ACCEPT
# net_input
-A net_input -j net2fw
# loc_input
-A loc_input -j loc2fw
# net_frwd
-A net_frwd -o eth1 -j net2loc
# loc_frwd
-A loc_frwd -o eth0 -j loc2net
# net2fw
-A net2fw -m conntrack --ctstate INVALID -j DROP
-A net2fw -s 2001:db8::10/128 -p tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT
-A net2fw -p ipv6-icmp --icmpv6-type 128 -j ACCEPT
-A net2fw -j shorewall_Drop
# net2loc
-A net2loc -m conntrack --ctstate INVALID -j DROP
-A net2loc -d 2001:db8::20/128 -p tcp -m multiport --dports 80,443 -j ACCEPT
-A net2loc -j shorewall_Drop
# loc2fw
-A loc2fw -m conntrack --ctstate INVALID -j DROP
-A loc2fw -p tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT
-A loc2fw -p ipv6-icmp --icmpv6-type 128 -j ACCEPT
-A loc2fw -j shorewall_Reject
# loc2net
-A loc2net -m conntrack --ctstate INVALID -j DROP
-A loc2net -p udp --dport 53 -j ACCEPT
-A loc2net -p tcp --dport 53 -j ACCEPT
-A loc2net -j ACCEPT
# fw2net
-A fw2net -m conntrack --ctstate INVALID -j DROP
-A fw2net -j ACCEPT
# fw2loc
-A fw2loc -m conntrack --ctstate INVALID -j DROP
-A fw2loc -j ACCEPT
# shorewall_Drop
-A shorewall_Drop -j DROP
# shorewall_Reject
-A shorewall_Reject -j REJECT --reject-with icmp6-adm-prohibited
COMMIT
